pi_items.verified_value: SQLSTATE 40P01 is a real PostgreSQL error code representing deadlock detection
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed: https://www.bytebase.com/reference/postgres/error/40p01-deadlock-detected/ and multiple authoritative PostgreSQL documentation sources

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Post-Incident Review (PIR) document for incident INC-4092, a synthetic checkout outage scenario. Input data is located at /home/ga/Documents/incident_ticket_4092.json (synthetic, created by setup script). Output must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/INC-4092_PIR.odt. The PIR document requires four Heading 1 sections: Executive Summary, Incident Timeline, Root Cause Analysis, and Corrective Actions. The incident involves a PostgreSQL deadlock (SQLSTATE 40P01 error) affecting the inventory_items table. Technical terms SQLSTATE 40P01 and inventory_items must be formatted in Courier New font. The document must include a footer with 'OmniCart Confidential' text and page numbers. The incident occurred on 2024-03-15 with 45-minute duration during a flash sale.
